description_long: This object consists of three distinct hats arranged side by side. The first is a white sports visor with a black butterfly logo on the front, featuring an open top and a curved brim. The second is a taupe bucket hat with a flat, circular crown and a short, downward-sloping brim, made from a soft, fabric-like material. The third is a straw sun hat with a wide, gently sloping brim and a rounded crown, adorned with a peach-colored ribbon tied at the back. The straw hat's woven texture and ribbon add a decorative touch, while the bucket hat and visor are more utilitarian in appearance. All three hats are typical personal accessories that might be seen in urban parks, sidewalks, or outdoor recreational areas. The materials and construction suggest lightweight, breathable designs suitable for sun protection and casual wear.
description: A set of three hats: a white sports visor with a butterfly logo, a taupe bucket hat, and a straw sun hat with a peach ribbon. Each hat features distinct shapes and materials, suitable for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three hats: the white visor with butterfly logo, the taupe bucket hat, and the straw sun hat with ribbon.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the straw hat with its ribbon, the back of the bucket hat, and the back band of the visor.
description_view_2: Reverse side showing the underside of the straw hat's brim and ribbon, the back of the bucket hat, and the inside of the visor.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the open top of the visor, the crown of the bucket hat, and the side profile of the straw hat.
attribute_brim_style: visor: curved and open; bucket hat: short, downward-sloping; sun hat: wide and gently sloping
attribute_crown_shape: visor: open top; bucket hat: flat-topped; sun hat: rounded crown
